name: BK Technologies Corp
summary: BK Technologies Corporation (BKTI) is a holding company that, through its operating subsidiary BK Technologies, Inc., designs, manufactures, and markets public safety communications products. Its Radio product group offers P25-compliant two-way land mobile radios (portable and mobile) for government, public safety, and military customers. Its Solutions product group offers BKONE-branded smartphone applications operating over public cellular networks to enhance situational awareness and coordination for first responders.

products.name: BKR Series Radios
products.description: P25-compliant two-way land mobile radios operating in VHF, UHF, and 700-800 MHz bands for public safety and government users.

products.name: KNG Series Radios
products.description: Legacy P25 digital and analog two-way land mobile radios for government and public safety markets.

products.name: BKONE
products.description: Smartphone application platform operating over public cellular networks providing situational awareness and coordination tools for first responders including law enforcement, fire, and EMS.
